test.name: full_fraud_scenario_catalog
test.objective: Create a fresh tenant with all requested fraud scenarios and run deterministic smoke cases.

Wallet Transfer Fraud Screening.name: High Transfer Amount
Wallet Transfer Fraud Screening.description: transaction.amount is greater than 3x the AVG of transaction.amount for the same account_ref between Now and 30 days before Now.

Wallet Transfer Fraud Screening.name: One Hour Transfer Burst
Wallet Transfer Fraud Screening.description: COUNT of transaction.transaction_id for the same account_ref between Now and 1 hour before Now is greater than 10.

Wallet Transfer Fraud Screening.name: Weekly Transfer Velocity
Wallet Transfer Fraud Screening.description: SUM of transaction.amount for the same account_ref between Now and 7 days before Now is greater than 50000.

Wallet Transfer Fraud Screening.name: New Device Transfer
Wallet Transfer Fraud Screening.description: transaction.device_id is not in the known device list for account.account_ref.

Wallet Transfer Fraud Screening.name: Shared Device Risk
Wallet Transfer Fraud Screening.description: COUNT_DISTINCT of transaction.account_ref using the same device_id between Now and 24 hours before Now is greater than 3.

Wallet Transfer Fraud Screening.name: Unusual IP Region
Wallet Transfer Fraud Screening.description: transaction.ip_region is not equal to account.usual_ip_region.

Wallet Transfer Fraud Screening.name: High Risk IP
Wallet Transfer Fraud Screening.description: transaction.ip is in the high-risk IP watchlist.

Wallet Transfer Fraud Screening.name: New Beneficiary
Wallet Transfer Fraud Screening.description: beneficiary.first_seen_at is within 24 hours before Now, and transaction.amount is greater than 2000.

Wallet Transfer Fraud Screening.name: Low KYC
Wallet Transfer Fraud Screening.group: High Transfer KYC and Account Profile Rules
Wallet Transfer Fraud Screening.description: account.kyc_level is less than required KYC level for transaction.amount.

Account Takeover Detection.name: New Device High Value Transaction
Account Takeover Detection.description: device.first_seen_at for the same device_id and account_ref is within 24 hours before Now, and transaction.amount is greater than 5000.

Account Takeover Detection.name: Suspicious IP
Account Takeover Detection.description: transaction.ip is in the high-risk IP watchlist, or IP_REPUTATION_SCORE(transaction.ip) is greater than 80.

Account Takeover Detection.name: Impossible Travel
Account Takeover Detection.description: DISTANCE_KM between the current transaction.ip_location and the previous transaction.ip_location for the same account_ref is greater than 500, and DATE_DIFF from the previous transaction is less than 2 hours.

Account Takeover Detection.name: Post Credential Change Transfer
Account Takeover Detection.description: DATE_DIFF between Now and account.last_password_change_at is less than 24 hours, and transaction.amount is greater than 2000.

Account Takeover Detection.name: Failed Login Before Transaction
Account Takeover Detection.description: COUNT of failed login attempts for the same account_ref between Now and 1 hour before Now is greater than 3.

Account Takeover Detection.name: New Beneficiary After Login
Account Takeover Detection.description: beneficiary.created_at is within 24 hours before Now, and transaction.amount to that beneficiary is greater than 1000.

Account Takeover Detection.name: Abnormal Account Spend
Account Takeover Detection.description: transaction.amount is greater than 3x the AVG of transaction.amount for the same account_ref between Now and 30 days before Now.

Account Takeover Detection.name: Rapid Post-Login Transfers
Account Takeover Detection.description: COUNT of transaction.transaction_id for the same account_ref between Now and 30 minutes before Now is greater than 5.

Merchant Abuse Monitoring.name: High Weekly Merchant Volume
Merchant Abuse Monitoring.description: SUM of transaction.amount for the same merchant_id between Now and 7 days before Now is greater than 100000.

Merchant Abuse Monitoring.name: Rapid Merchant Payment Burst
Merchant Abuse Monitoring.description: COUNT of transaction.transaction_id for the same merchant_id between Now and 1 hour before Now is greater than 50.

Merchant Abuse Monitoring.name: Watchlisted Merchant Name Match
Merchant Abuse Monitoring.description: FUZZY_MATCH of merchant.merchant_name against the merchant watchlist is greater than the configured match threshold.

Merchant Abuse Monitoring.name: Merchant Category Mismatch
Merchant Abuse Monitoring.description: merchant.merchant_category is not consistent with product.product_category.

Merchant Abuse Monitoring.name: Repeated Same Account Payments
Merchant Abuse Monitoring.description: COUNT of transaction.transaction_id for the same merchant_id and same account_ref between Now and 24 hours before Now is greater than 10.

Merchant Abuse Monitoring.name: Shared Merchant IP Cluster
Merchant Abuse Monitoring.description: COUNT_DISTINCT of merchant_id using the same transaction.ip between Now and 24 hours before Now is greater than 5.

Merchant Abuse Monitoring.name: Abnormal Merchant Average Ticket
Merchant Abuse Monitoring.description: transaction.amount is greater than 3x the AVG of transaction.amount for the same merchant_id between Now and 30 days before Now.

Merchant Abuse Monitoring.name: Settlement Account Recently Changed
Merchant Abuse Monitoring.description: DATE_DIFF between Now and merchant.settlement_account_updated_at is less than 48 hours, and SUM of transaction.amount for the same merchant_id between Now and 24 hours before Now is greater than 20000.

High Value Transaction Review.name: Product Limit Breach
High Value Transaction Review.description: transaction.amount is greater than product.max_amount for the matching product_id.

High Value Transaction Review.name: Low KYC High Value Transaction
High Value Transaction Review.description: account.kyc_level is less than the required KYC level for transaction.amount.

High Value Transaction Review.name: New Device High Value Transaction
High Value Transaction Review.description: device.first_seen_at for the same device_id and account_ref is within 24 hours before Now, and transaction.amount is greater than 5000.

High Value Transaction Review.name: Unusual IP High Value Transaction
High Value Transaction Review.description: transaction.ip is in the high-risk IP watchlist, or IP_REPUTATION_SCORE(transaction.ip) is greater than 80.

High Value Transaction Review.name: Abnormal High Value Spend
High Value Transaction Review.description: transaction.amount is greater than 3x the AVG of transaction.amount for the same account_ref between Now and 30 days before Now.

High Value Transaction Review.name: Fast Outflow After Funding
High Value Transaction Review.description: SUM of incoming transaction.amount for the same account_ref between Now and 24 hours before Now is greater than 10000, and the current outgoing transaction.amount is greater than 80% of that sum.

High Value Transaction Review.name: Recent Account Change High Value Transaction
High Value Transaction Review.description: DATE_DIFF between Now and account.last_profile_change_at is less than 24 hours, and transaction.amount is greater than 5000.

Card Payment Authorization Risk.name: High Card Payment Amount
Card Payment Authorization Risk.description: transaction.channel is equal to card, and transaction.amount is greater than 5000.

Card Payment Authorization Risk.name: Product Limit Breach
Card Payment Authorization Risk.description: transaction.channel is equal to card, and transaction.amount is greater than product.max_amount for the matching product_id.

Card Payment Authorization Risk.name: High Risk Merchant Category
Card Payment Authorization Risk.description: transaction.channel is equal to card, and merchant.merchant_category is in the high-risk merchant category watchlist.

Card Payment Authorization Risk.name: Card Testing Pattern
Card Payment Authorization Risk.description: COUNT of declined card transactions for the same account_ref between Now and 30 minutes before Now is greater than 5.

Card Payment Authorization Risk.name: Small-To-Large Card Escalation
Card Payment Authorization Risk.description: COUNT of card transactions below 20 for the same account_ref between Now and 1 hour before Now is greater than 3, and current transaction.amount is greater than 1000.

Card Payment Authorization Risk.name: Abnormal Card Spend
Card Payment Authorization Risk.description: transaction.channel is equal to card, and transaction.amount is greater than 3x the AVG of card transaction.amount for the same account_ref between Now and 30 days before Now.

Card Payment Authorization Risk.name: Suspicious IP Card Payment
Card Payment Authorization Risk.description: transaction.channel is equal to card, and transaction.ip is in the high-risk IP watchlist or IP_REPUTATION_SCORE(transaction.ip) is greater than 80.

Card Payment Authorization Risk.name: Unusual Card Payment Hour
Card Payment Authorization Risk.description: transaction.channel is equal to card, and transaction.date occurs outside the customer's usual active transaction hours calculated from the same account_ref over the last 30 days.

Bank Transfer Risk Assessment.name: High Bank Transfer Amount
Bank Transfer Risk Assessment.description: transaction.channel is equal to bank, and transaction.amount is greater than 10000.

Bank Transfer Risk Assessment.name: Product Limit Breach
Bank Transfer Risk Assessment.description: transaction.channel is equal to bank, and transaction.amount is greater than product.max_amount for the matching product_id.

Bank Transfer Risk Assessment.name: New Beneficiary
Bank Transfer Risk Assessment.description: beneficiary.created_at is within 24 hours before Now, and transaction.amount is greater than 5000.

Bank Transfer Risk Assessment.name: First Transfer To Beneficiary
Bank Transfer Risk Assessment.description: COUNT of previous transactions for the same account_ref and beneficiary.account_ref before Now is equal to 0, and transaction.amount is greater than 2000.

Bank Transfer Risk Assessment.name: Rapid Bank Transfer Burst
Bank Transfer Risk Assessment.description: COUNT of bank transaction.transaction_id for the same account_ref between Now and 1 hour before Now is greater than 5.

Bank Transfer Risk Assessment.name: Post Account Change Bank Transfer
Bank Transfer Risk Assessment.description: DATE_DIFF between Now and account.last_profile_change_at is less than 24 hours, and transaction.channel is equal to bank.

Bank Transfer Risk Assessment.name: Beneficiary Shared Across Many Accounts
Bank Transfer Risk Assessment.description: COUNT_DISTINCT of transaction.account_ref sending to the same beneficiary.account_ref between Now and 7 days before Now is greater than 10.

Bank Transfer Risk Assessment.name: Abnormal Bank Transfer Amount
Bank Transfer Risk Assessment.description: transaction.amount is greater than 3x the AVG of bank transaction.amount for the same account_ref between Now and 30 days before Now.

Cash-Out Fraud Monitoring.name: Fast Cash-Out After Funding
Cash-Out Fraud Monitoring.description: SUM of incoming transaction.amount for the same account_ref between Now and 24 hours before Now is greater than 5000, and the current cash-out transaction.amount is greater than 80% of that sum.

Cash-Out Fraud Monitoring.name: Rapid Cash-Out Burst
Cash-Out Fraud Monitoring.description: COUNT of cash-out transaction.transaction_id for the same account_ref between Now and 1 hour before Now is greater than 3.

Cash-Out Fraud Monitoring.name: High Cash-Out Amount
Cash-Out Fraud Monitoring.description: transaction.system_type is equal to cash_out, and transaction.amount is greater than 5000.

Cash-Out Fraud Monitoring.name: Agent High Daily Cash-Out Volume
Cash-Out Fraud Monitoring.description: SUM of cash-out transaction.amount for the same merchant_id between Now and 24 hours before Now is greater than 50000.

Cash-Out Fraud Monitoring.name: Agent Shared Across Many Accounts
Cash-Out Fraud Monitoring.description: COUNT_DISTINCT of transaction.account_ref cashing out through the same merchant_id between Now and 24 hours before Now is greater than 20.

Cash-Out Fraud Monitoring.name: Unusual Cash-Out Location
Cash-Out Fraud Monitoring.description: transaction.system_type is equal to cash_out, and transaction.ip_location.region is not equal to the usual region for the same account_ref calculated over the last 30 days.

Cash-Out Fraud Monitoring.name: Abnormal Cash-Out Amount
Cash-Out Fraud Monitoring.description: transaction.amount is greater than 3x the AVG of cash-out transaction.amount for the same account_ref between Now and 30 days before Now.

Cash-Out Fraud Monitoring.name: Low KYC Cash-Out
Cash-Out Fraud Monitoring.description: account.kyc_level is less than the required KYC level for the cash-out transaction.amount.

New Beneficiary Payment Review.name: New Beneficiary High Value Payment
New Beneficiary Payment Review.description: beneficiary.created_at is within 24 hours before Now, and transaction.amount is greater than 5000.

New Beneficiary Payment Review.name: First Payment To Beneficiary
New Beneficiary Payment Review.description: COUNT of previous transactions for the same account_ref and beneficiary.account_ref before Now is equal to 0, and current transaction.amount is greater than 2000.

New Beneficiary Payment Review.name: Rapid New Beneficiary Additions
New Beneficiary Payment Review.description: COUNT of new beneficiaries created for the same account_ref between Now and 24 hours before Now is greater than 3.

New Beneficiary Payment Review.name: Beneficiary Watchlist Match
New Beneficiary Payment Review.description: FUZZY_MATCH of beneficiary.name or beneficiary.account_ref against the beneficiary watchlist is greater than the configured match threshold.

New Beneficiary Payment Review.name: New Device Beneficiary Payment
New Beneficiary Payment Review.description: device.first_seen_at for the same device_id and account_ref is within 24 hours before Now, and payment is made to a new beneficiary.

New Beneficiary Payment Review.name: Suspicious IP Beneficiary Payment
New Beneficiary Payment Review.description: transaction.ip is in the high-risk IP watchlist or IP_REPUTATION_SCORE(transaction.ip) is greater than 80, and payment is made to a new beneficiary.

New Beneficiary Payment Review.name: Post Account Change Beneficiary Payment
New Beneficiary Payment Review.description: DATE_DIFF between Now and account.last_profile_change_at is less than 24 hours, and payment is made to a new beneficiary.

New Beneficiary Payment Review.name: Abnormal First Beneficiary Payment
New Beneficiary Payment Review.description: transaction.amount is greater than 3x the AVG of first-beneficiary-payment transaction.amount for the same account_ref between Now and 30 days before Now.

Dormant Account Reactivation Risk.name: Dormant Account Transaction
Dormant Account Reactivation Risk.description: DATE_DIFF between Now and account.last_transaction_at is greater than 90 days, and current transaction.amount is greater than 1000.

Dormant Account Reactivation Risk.name: High First Transaction After Dormancy
Dormant Account Reactivation Risk.description: DATE_DIFF between Now and account.last_transaction_at is greater than 90 days, and current transaction.amount is greater than 3x the AVG of transaction.amount for the same account_ref before dormancy.

Dormant Account Reactivation Risk.name: New Device After Dormancy
Dormant Account Reactivation Risk.description: DATE_DIFF between Now and account.last_transaction_at is greater than 90 days, and device.first_seen_at for the same device_id and account_ref is within 24 hours before Now.

Dormant Account Reactivation Risk.name: Suspicious IP After Dormancy
Dormant Account Reactivation Risk.description: DATE_DIFF between Now and account.last_transaction_at is greater than 90 days, and transaction.ip is in the high-risk IP watchlist or IP_REPUTATION_SCORE(transaction.ip) is greater than 80.

Dormant Account Reactivation Risk.name: Account Change After Dormancy
Dormant Account Reactivation Risk.description: DATE_DIFF between Now and account.last_transaction_at is greater than 90 days, and DATE_DIFF between Now and account.last_profile_change_at is less than 24 hours.

Dormant Account Reactivation Risk.name: New Beneficiary After Dormancy
Dormant Account Reactivation Risk.description: DATE_DIFF between Now and account.last_transaction_at is greater than 90 days, and beneficiary.created_at is within 24 hours before Now.

Dormant Account Reactivation Risk.name: Rapid Transfers After Dormancy
Dormant Account Reactivation Risk.description: DATE_DIFF between Now and account.last_transaction_at is greater than 90 days, and COUNT of transaction.transaction_id for the same account_ref between Now and 1 hour before Now is greater than 3.

Dormant Account Reactivation Risk.name: Balance Drain After Dormancy
Dormant Account Reactivation Risk.description: DATE_DIFF between Now and account.last_transaction_at is greater than 90 days, and current transaction.amount is greater than 80% of account.available_balance.

Cross-Border or Proxy Access Review.name: IP Country Mismatch
Cross-Border or Proxy Access Review.description: IP_COUNTRY(transaction.ip) is not equal to account.country.

Cross-Border or Proxy Access Review.name: High Risk Network Access
Cross-Border or Proxy Access Review.description: transaction.ip is in the VPN, proxy, TOR, hosting provider, or high-risk ASN watchlist.

Cross-Border or Proxy Access Review.name: Impossible Travel Access
Cross-Border or Proxy Access Review.description: DISTANCE_KM between the current IP_LOCATION(transaction.ip) and the previous IP_LOCATION(transaction.ip) for the same account_ref is greater than 500, and DATE_DIFF from the previous transaction is less than 2 hours.

Cross-Border or Proxy Access Review.name: New Device Foreign Access
Cross-Border or Proxy Access Review.description: IP_COUNTRY(transaction.ip) is not equal to account.country, and device.first_seen_at for the same device_id and account_ref is within 24 hours before Now.

Cross-Border or Proxy Access Review.name: High Value Foreign Access Transaction
Cross-Border or Proxy Access Review.description: IP_COUNTRY(transaction.ip) is not equal to account.country, and transaction.amount is greater than 5000.

Cross-Border or Proxy Access Review.name: Foreign Access Behavior Change
Cross-Border or Proxy Access Review.description: IP_COUNTRY(transaction.ip) is not equal to account.country, and transaction.amount is greater than 3x the AVG of transaction.amount for the same account_ref between Now and 30 days before Now.

Cross-Border or Proxy Access Review.name: Shared Suspicious IP Across Accounts
Cross-Border or Proxy Access Review.description: COUNT_DISTINCT of transaction.account_ref using the same transaction.ip between Now and 24 hours before Now is greater than 5.

Cross-Border or Proxy Access Review.name: Cross-Border Rapid Transaction
Cross-Border or Proxy Access Review.description: IP_COUNTRY(transaction.ip) is not equal to account.country, and COUNT of transaction.transaction_id for the same account_ref between Now and 1 hour before Now is greater than 5.

Chango Group Contribution Fraud Monitori.name: High Weekly Group Contribution Value
Chango Group Contribution Fraud Monitori.description: SUM of transaction.amount for the same group_id between Now and 7 days before Now is greater than 50000.

Chango Group Contribution Fraud Monitori.name: Rapid Group Contribution Burst
Chango Group Contribution Fraud Monitori.description: COUNT of transaction.transaction_id for the same group_id between Now and 1 hour before Now is greater than 25.

Chango Group Contribution Fraud Monitori.name: New Account Contribution Spike
Chango Group Contribution Fraud Monitori.description: COUNT of transaction.transaction_id where account.account_ref equals transaction.account_ref and account.created_at is within 7 days before Now is greater than 3.

Chango Group Contribution Fraud Monitori.name: Low KYC High Contribution
Chango Group Contribution Fraud Monitori.description: account.kyc_level is less than the required KYC level for transaction.amount.

Chango Group Contribution Fraud Monitori.name: Shared IP Contributor Cluster
Chango Group Contribution Fraud Monitori.group: Device and IP Link Analysis Risk
Chango Group Contribution Fraud Monitori.description: COUNT_DISTINCT of transaction.account_ref using the same transaction.ip between Now and 24 hours before Now is greater than 5.

Chango Group Contribution Fraud Monitori.name: Watchlisted Campaign Name Match
Chango Group Contribution Fraud Monitori.description: FUZZY_MATCH of group.name against the campaign watchlist is greater than the configured match threshold.

Chango Group Contribution Fraud Monitori.name: Threshold Structuring Pattern
Chango Group Contribution Fraud Monitori.description: COUNT of transaction.transaction_id for the same group_id where transaction.amount is just below the review threshold between Now and 24 hours before Now is greater than 10.

Chango Group Contribution Fraud Monitori.name: Abnormal Contribution Amount
Chango Group Contribution Fraud Monitori.description: transaction.amount is greater than 3x the AVG of transaction.amount for the same account_ref between Now and 30 days before Now.

Chango Disbursement and Borrowing Risk R.name: Missing Vote Approval
Chango Disbursement and Borrowing Risk R.description: group.vote_approval_status is not equal to approved when transaction.system_type is equal to disbursement.

Chango Disbursement and Borrowing Risk R.name: Insufficient Approved Votes
Chango Disbursement and Borrowing Risk R.description: COUNT of approved votes for the same group_id is less than group.required_vote_count.

Chango Disbursement and Borrowing Risk R.name: Watchlisted Destination Match
Chango Disbursement and Borrowing Risk R.description: FUZZY_MATCH of disbursement.destination_account_ref against the destination watchlist is greater than the configured match threshold.

Chango Disbursement and Borrowing Risk R.name: Public Group Destination Mismatch
Chango Disbursement and Borrowing Risk R.description: group.type is equal to public, and disbursement.destination_account_ref is not equal to group.verified_settlement_account_ref.

Chango Disbursement and Borrowing Risk R.name: Fast Cashout After Contribution Spike
Chango Disbursement and Borrowing Risk R.description: SUM of transaction.amount for contributions into the same group_id between Now and 24 hours before Now is greater than 30000, and transaction.system_type is equal to disbursement.

Chango Disbursement and Borrowing Risk R.name: High Group Balance Withdrawal
Chango Disbursement and Borrowing Risk R.description: SUM of disbursement.amount for the same group_id between Now and 7 days before Now is greater than 80% of group.current_balance.

Chango Disbursement and Borrowing Risk R.name: Borrowing Above Limit
Chango Disbursement and Borrowing Risk R.description: SUM of loan.amount for the same account_ref where loan.status is not equal to paid is greater than account.borrowing_limit.

Chango Disbursement and Borrowing Risk R.name: New Member High Loan Request
Chango Disbursement and Borrowing Risk R.group: Member Tenure and Contribution History Risk
Chango Disbursement and Borrowing Risk R.description: DATE_DIFF between Now and member.joined_at is less than 7 days, and loan.amount is greater than 1000.

Regulatory Reporting Review.name: Cash Transaction Threshold Report
Regulatory Reporting Review.description: transaction.channel is cash or branch cash, and transaction.currency is GHS, and transaction.amount is greater than or equal to 50000.

Regulatory Reporting Review.name: Suspicious Low-Value Repeated Activity
Regulatory Reporting Review.description: COUNT of transaction.transaction_id for the same account_ref between Now and 1 day before Now is greater than or equal to 5, and SUM of transaction.amount for the same account_ref in that period is low or unusual compared with the account's normal activity.

Regulatory Reporting Review.name: Cross-Border Currency Declaration Review
Regulatory Reporting Review.description: transaction.system_type is cross-border cash declaration, and transaction.country is not the customer's usual country, or transaction.entry_point_type is airport or land border.

Regulatory Reporting Review.name: Electronic Transfer Reporting Threshold
Regulatory Reporting Review.description: transaction.channel is bank or electronic transfer, and transaction.currency is USD, and transaction.amount is greater than 1000, and transaction.direction is inward or outward.

expected_rules: Recent Account Change High Value Transaction
triggered_rules: Recent Account Change High Value Transaction

expected_rules: Recent Account Change High Value Transaction
triggered_rules: Recent Account Change High Value Transaction
